text.title: CI Quality Gate Design Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the ci-design artefact. Pre-merge gate rejects CI changes that don't update this artefact.

example.note: artefact_id missing cgd- prefix; owner_email=team@ (r5 violation); BLOCK lint without rationale (r2); block_critical_path_min=28 > target=10, headroom negative (r3 budget violation); verdict=commit-design impossible; version + last_reviewed malformed.

antipattern.description: block_critical_path_min > target_min with no remediation listed.
antipattern.reason: r3 violation; documented denial is worse than no budget.
r5 violation; unowned BLOCK checks get bypassed.
